title: bidens zairensis
intro: Bidens zairensis, also known as the Zaire beggarticks, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin infections. Bidens zairensis can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
